title: Buttery Canadian Butter Pancake
description: An indulgent Canadian dish featuring semi-skimmed milk and a flaky texture, this buttery pancake is perfect for breakfast or dessert. Its also paleo-friendly, making it accessible to those following specific dietary restrictions.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick pan over medium heat.
In a mixing bowl, whisk together milk, almond flour, coconut oil, eggs, and baking powder. Add sweetener to taste if desired.
Once the pan is hot, pour in about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake (about 2-3 pancakes total). Cook for 2 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
Serve warm with your favorite toppings like maple syrup and fresh fruit.
